title: skill-conductor run log
description: Run trace emitted by skill-conductor: every stage attempt, its gate result, the loops taken, and the final verdict. The conductor runs no scripts of its own; it orchestrates skill-guidance, skill-engineer, and skill-zipper and records what their artifacts showed.

target.description: Path to the target skill driven through the pipeline.

goal.description: The one-sentence original goal from Step 1 — the yardstick Final Acceptance measures intent against.

stages.description: One entry per stage attempt (pass or fail), in execution order.

stage.description: Which pipeline stage this attempt ran.

iteration.description: 1-based attempt counter for this stage (increments on each repeat).

artifact_path.description: Path to the artifact this stage emitted and the gate read (e.g. the handoff-spec or build-report).

gate_evidence.description: The concrete artifact field values read to decide the gate (e.g. 'ran=true, pass=4/4, P0s 3/3 done' or 'diff exit 0, 0 LOST').

action.description: What the conductor did after this gate: proceed downstream, repeat this stage, loop back to an earlier stage, finish, or stop unmet.

loops_taken.description: Count of full pipeline loops: Final-Acceptance returns and Stage-E to Stage-G design-wrong loopbacks. In-stage repeats are not counted here; they appear as repeated stages[] entries.

final_verdict.description: done = Final Acceptance cleared the bar; stopped_unmet = budget exhausted with gates still failing (never faked).

quality.description: Separates the two quality signals so guidance cannot bless its own build. effective_verdict = min(re_audit_verdict, battery_verdict); industrial ONLY if effective_verdict is industrial (battery clean).

re_audit_verdict.description: guidance pillar-presence re-audit of the built skill.

battery_verdict.description: fresh-subagent independent battery: industrial only if zero bugs incl. green-but-wrong.

effective_verdict.description: min(re_audit_verdict, battery_verdict) — never exceeds the battery.

blocking_gaps.description: Empty on 'done'; the honest unmet gaps on 'stopped_unmet'.
